title: Bellamy Mocks the Dreamers
description: The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Zoro. The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Cut the ropes and secure our safety!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: It's nowhere near nighttime right now!

dialogue.speaker: Mock Town pirate
dialogue.text: We're gonna sink if we stay here!

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Let's hurry up and rescue boss!

summary: The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.
